description:
If you want to understand where the future is headed, start with Big Ideas 2026. In this video, ARK CEO/CIO Cathie Wood walks through the report, emphasizing the key technologies and convergences guiding the next wave of innovation—and why they matter NOW.

Download Big Ideas 2026: https://www.ark-invest.com/big-ideas-2026

This year's sections:
The Great Acceleration
Al Infrastructure
The Al Consumer Operating System
Al Productivity
Bitcoin
Tokenized Assets
Decentralized Finance Applications
Multiomics
Reusable Rockets
Robotics
Distributed Energy
Autonomous Vehicles
Autonomous Logistics
